justification: Both extractions are nearly identical in quality across all four dimensions. Both correctly extract the same skill set (including Scikit-Learn from demonstrated project use), maintain appropriate conservatism, omit explicit project_type classification fields (making both neutral on that dimension), and capture the same concrete metrics (52% latency reduction, 98% time reduction, 83% accuracy, 5 hrs/week saved, 1,000+ orders, 30,000+ students). Minor differences: B preserves the original resume language more faithfully and includes Coursework as a skill category, while A adds slightly more editorial polish to bullets. Neither difference is significant enough to declare a clear winner — the outputs are genuinely equivalent within one point on every dimension.
